initial_req: I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.
I need an instant messaging application for real-time communication between users.

history.question: What types of communication should the app support beyond basic text messaging (e.g., voice/video calls, file sharing, group chats, message reactions)?
history.answer: Beyond basic text messaging, the app should support sending images, videos, and files for sharing various forms of content. It should also support voice calls and video calls for audio and video communication. Additionally, users should be able to add friends and create groups to connect with other users.
